## Checklist

- [ ] Tested in a clean Unreal Engine 5 project (plugin enables, server starts)
- [ ] Verified affected tools end-to-end from an MCP client
- [ ] Ran `python3 scripts/validate_repo.py`
- [ ] Ran `node --test tests/` and `python3 -m unittest discover -s tests`
- [ ] Updated `README.md` **and** `README_CN.md` (incl. tool counts) for user-facing changes
- [ ] Updated `CHANGELOG.md`
- [ ] No `.DS_Store` / `__pycache__` junk
